description_long: This is a rectangular, one-liter juice carton with a predominantly green and white color scheme, branded as 'EASY MOUZUO'. The front and back panels feature vibrant images of a ripe mango, with the product name 'mango nectar' and 'boisson de mangue' clearly displayed in both English and French. The packaging includes a safety and quality seal, and the lower front corner indicates the volume as 1 liter (33.8 fl oz). One side panel displays detailed nutritional facts, while the opposite side contains multilingual ingredient and product information, along with a barcode. The top of the carton is green and appears to have a sealed, foldable spout typical of juice cartons, but no visible cap. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A green and white one-liter mango juice carton with vibrant mango imagery, clear branding, and detailed nutritional and product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'EASY MOUZUO' brand, mango imagery, and product name in both English and French.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional facts panel and part of the green top.
description_view_2: Back view with similar branding and mango imagery as the front, but labeled 'mango nectar' in English.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multilingual product information and a barcode.
